title: Aluminium Kitchen Foil 2 Rolls 30cm x 12M Cooking Tin Foil Catering Foil Food Wrap Foils for Baking Grilling Roasting BBQ Storage Restrurant Style Value Pack Premium Foils
features: Premium Quality Material – Made from strong aluminium, this kitchen foil offers excellent durability, tear resistance, and flexibility, making it perfect for both home and professional catering use.
description: Strong and durable aluminium kitchen foil roll designed for everyday use in homes, takeaways, and professional catering kitchens. Also known as kitchen foil, tin foil, cooking foil, or catering foil, this high-quality foil provides excellent strength, flexibility, and tear resistance for reliable food wrapping and cooking performance. This pack includes 2 foil rolls, each measuring approximately 30cm x 12 metres, giving a total of 24 metres foil. The generous length ensures long-lasting use for daily food preparation, baking, grilling, roasting, and food storage without frequent replacement. Ideal for multiple kitchen applications including wrapping sandwiches, covering dishes, lining trays, BBQ grilling, roasting meats, baking, and storing leftovers. The foil helps retain heat, lock in moisture, and preserve freshness in the fridge, freezer, or during transport. Easy to tear, handle, and store, this versatile foil roll is suitable for household kitchens, restaurants, catering businesses, and takeaway use. A practical and essential food wrapping foil solution for reliable, hygienic, and convenient cooking and storage needs across UK kitchens.
